name: hk_1_6
requirements: As part of your analysis, over 2025-06-01 to 2025-06-06 compute and store: mean_pm25_central, mean_aqhi_central (station 16), mean_pm25_tuenmun, mean_aqhi_tuenmun (station 5) (float).

turns.query: Conduct comprehensive temporal pollution transport analysis between Central (station_id: 16) and Tuen Mun (station_id: 5) from 2025-06-01 to 2025-06-06.
